Participant Journey timeline

The 7 illustrations cropped from your funnel infographic, on equal-height, aligned cards. Shown below in both English (LTR) and Arabic (RTL) exactly as the component lays them out. In the app these reveal with a scroll-triggered animation.

    الوعي

  6. ٦

  7. ٧

    المكافآت

    تقدير الإنجازات والاحتفال بالأثر
